eas_text: A civil authority has issued A FIRE WARNING for the following counties or areas: Yavapai, AZ; at 7:07 PM on JUL 9, 2026 Effective until 7:07 PM JUL 10, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
Yavapai Sheriff Alert: 07/09/26 7 pm
All previous GO alerts are rolled back to SET Status for YCU-2333 and YCU-2336. Residence may return, beware of emergency services and personal in the area.
